name: Sparkling Salad
recipeInstructions:
To make frosted grapes for decorations:
1. Beat egg white until frothy.
2. Dip the grapes into egg white, then immediately roll in sugar (superfine is best), and place on waxed paper to dry.
Salad:
1. Dissolve lime gelatin in 1 cup very hot water. Stir in lemon-lime soda until mixture reaches a consistency like beaten egg whites.
2. Oil a decorative 1-quart mold with vegetable oil; do not use olive oil. Drain excess oil by inverting the mold.
3. When the gelatin is slightly thickened, add applesauce and stir quickly. Pour into mold and chill until firm.
4. Unmold onto serving plate and surround with frosted grapes and mint sprigs.
